<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">-- Adminer 4.0.3 MySQL dump</span>

<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">SET NAMES utf8;</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">SET foreign_key_checks = 0;</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">SET time_zone = '+00:00';</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">SET sql_mode = 'NO_AUTO_VALUE_ON_ZERO';</span>

<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">DROP TABLE IF EXISTS `wp_commentmeta`;</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">CREATE TABLE `wp_commentmeta` (</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">`meta_id` bigint(20) unsigned NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">`comment_id` bigint(20) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">`meta_key` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">`meta_value` longtext,</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">PRIMARY KEY (`meta_id`),</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">KEY `comment_id` (`comment_id`),</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">KEY `meta_key` (`meta_key`)</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">) ENGINE=MyISAM DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8;</span>


<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">DROP TABLE IF EXISTS `wp_comments`;</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">CREATE TABLE `wp_comments` (</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">`comment_ID` bigint(20) unsigned NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">`comment_post_ID` bigint(20) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">`comment_author` tinytext NOT NULL,</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">`comment_author_email` varchar(100) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">`comment_author_url` varchar(200) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">`comment_author_IP` varchar(100) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">`comment_date` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT '0000-00-00 00:00:00',</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">`comment_date_gmt` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT '0000-00-00 00:00:00',</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">`comment_content` text NOT NULL,</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">`comment_karma` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">`comment_approved` varchar(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT '1',</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">`comment_agent` varchar(255) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">`comment_type` varchar(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">`comment_parent` bigint(20) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">`user_id` bigint(20) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">PRIMARY KEY (`comment_ID`),</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">KEY `comment_post_ID` (`comment_post_ID`),</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">KEY `comment_approved_date_gmt` (`comment_approved`,`comment_date_gmt`),</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">KEY `comment_date_gmt` (`comment_date_gmt`),</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">KEY `comment_parent` (`comment_parent`),</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">KEY `comment_author_email` (`comment_author_email`(10))</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">) ENGINE=MyISAM DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8;</span>

<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">INSERT INTO `wp_comments` (`comment_ID`, `comment_post_ID`, `comment_author`, `comment_author_email`, `comment_author_url`, `comment_author_IP`, `comment_date`, `comment_date_gmt`, `comment_content`, `comment_karma`, `comment_approved`, `comment_agent`, `comment_type`, `comment_parent`, `user_id`) VALUES</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">(1,	1,	'Mr WordPress',	'',	'https://wordpress.org/',	'',	'2015-02-19 08:36:33',	'2015-02-19 08:36:33',	'Hi, this is a comment.\nTo delete a comment, just log in and view the post's comments. There you will have the option to edit or delete them.',	0,	'post-trashed',	'',	'',	0,	0);</span>

<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">DROP TABLE IF EXISTS `wp_links`;</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">CREATE TABLE `wp_links` (</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">`link_id` bigint(20) unsigned NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">`link_url` varchar(255) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">`link_name` varchar(255) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">`link_image` varchar(255) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">`link_target` varchar(25) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">`link_description` varchar(255) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">`link_visible` varchar(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'Y',</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">`link_owner` bigint(20) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '1',</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">`link_rating` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">`link_updated` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT '0000-00-00 00:00:00',</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">`link_rel` varchar(255) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">`link_notes` mediumtext NOT NULL,</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">`link_rss` varchar(255) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">PRIMARY KEY (`link_id`),</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">KEY `link_visible` (`link_visible`)</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">) ENGINE=MyISAM DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8;</span>


<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">DROP TABLE IF EXISTS `wp_options`;</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">CREATE TABLE `wp_options` (</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">`option_id` bigint(20) unsigned NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">`option_name` varchar(64) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">`option_value` longtext NOT NULL,</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">`autoload` varchar(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'yes',</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">PRIMARY KEY (`option_id`),</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">UNIQUE KEY `option_name` (`option_name`)</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">) ENGINE=MyISAM DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8;</span>

4.1.1 is now available. This maintenance release fixes 21 bugs in version 4.1. Some of you may have been waiting to update to the latest version until now, but there just wasn’t much to address. WordPress 4.1 was a smooth-sailing release and has seen more than 14 million downloads in the last two months. For a full […]\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}}s:32:\"http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/\";a:1:{s:7:\"creator\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:12:\"Andrew Nacin\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}}s:40:\"http://purl.org/rss/1.0/modules/content/\";a:1:{s:7:\"encoded\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:3086:\"</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">WordPress 4.1.1 is now available. This maintenance release fixes 21 bugs in version 4.1.</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">Some of you may have been waiting to update to the latest version until now, but there just wasn’t much to address. WordPress 4.1 was a smooth-sailing release and has seen more than 14 million downloads in the last two months.</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">For a full list of changes, consult the</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22https://core.trac.wordpress.org/query?milestone=4.1.1&group=severity&order=component%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>list of tickets</u></a> <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">and the</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22https://core.trac.wordpress.org/log/branches/4.1?stop_rev=30974&rev=31474%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>changelog</u></a><span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">. We fixed one annoying issue where a tag and a category with the same name could get muddled and prevent each other from being updated.</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">If you are one of the millions already running WordPress 4.1 and your site, we’ve started rolling out automatic background updates for 4.1.1 for sites</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22https://wordpress.org/plugins/background-update-tester/%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>that support them</u></a><span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">. Otherwise,</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22https://wordpress.org/download/%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>download WordPress 4.1.1</u></a> <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">or visit</span> <span style="font-family:Courier-Bold;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;"><b>Dashboard</b></span> <span style="font-family:Menlo-Bold;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;"><b>→</b></span> <span style="font-family:Courier-Bold;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;"><b>Updates</b></span> <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">and simply click “Update Now.”</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">Thanks to everyone who contributed to 4.1.1:</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22https://profiles.wordpress.org/afercia%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>Andrea Fercia</u></a><span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">,</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22https://profiles.wordpress.org/boonebgorges%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22https://profiles.wordpress.org/sippis%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>sippis</u></a><span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">,</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22https://profiles.wordpress.org/tmatsuur%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>tmatsuur</u></a><span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">,</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22https://profiles.wordpress.org/tyxla%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>Marin Atanasov</u></a><span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">,</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22https://profiles.wordpress.org/valendesigns%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>Derek Herman</u></a><span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">, and</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22https://profiles.wordpress.org/westonruter%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>Weston Ruter</u></a><span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">.</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">It is with both great honor and sadness we also recognize Kim Parsell as a contributor to this release and a</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22https://make.wordpress.org/docs/2015/01/05/rip-kim-parsell/%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>truly beloved member of the community</u></a> <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">until her untimely passing in December. The project is working to establish a conference travel</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22https://make.wordpress.org/community/2015/01/15/remembering-kim-parsell/%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>scholarship</u></a> <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">in her memory. We miss you, Kim.</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}}s:36:\"http://wellformedweb.org/CommentAPI/\";a:1:{s:10:\"commentRss\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:56:\"https://wordpress.org/news/2015/02/wordpress-4-1-1/feed/\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}}s:38:\"http://purl.org/rss/1.0/modules/slash/\";a:1:{s:8:\"comments\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:1:\"0\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}}}}i:1;a:6:{s:4:\"data\";s:42:\"\n		\n		\n		\n		\n		\n				\n\n		\n		\n				\n			\n		\n		\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";s:5:\"child\";a:5:{s:0:\"\";a:7:{s:5:\"title\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:25:\"WordPress 4.1 “Dinah”\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}s:4:\"link\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:41:\"https://wordpress.org/news/2014/12/dinah/\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}s:8:\"comments\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:50:\"https://wordpress.org/news/2014/12/dinah/#comments\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}s:7:\"pubDate\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:31:\"Thu, 18 Dec 2014 18:35:05 +0000\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}s:8:\"category\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:8:\"Releases\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}s:4:\"guid\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:33:\"http://wordpress.org/news/?p=3386\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:1:{s:0:\"\";a:1:{s:11:\"isPermaLink\";s:5:\"false\";}}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}s:11:\"description\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:360:\"Version 4.1 of WordPress, named “Dinah” in honor of jazz singer Dinah Washington, is available for download or update in your WordPress dashboard. New features in WordPress 4.1 help you focus on your writing, and the new default theme lets you show it off in style. Introducing Twenty Fifteen Our newest default theme, Twenty Fifteen, is […]\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}}s:32:\"http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/\";a:1:{s:7:\"creator\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:14:\"Matt Mullenweg\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}}s:40:\"http://purl.org/rss/1.0/modules/content/\";a:1:{s:7:\"encoded\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:24570:\"</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">Version 4.1 of WordPress, named “Dinah” in honor of jazz singer</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22http://wikipedia.org/wiki/Dinah_Washington%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>Dinah Washington</u></a><span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">, is available for download or update in your WordPress dashboard. New features in WordPress 4.1 help you focus on your writing, and the new default theme lets you show it off in style.</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>

<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier-Bold;font-size:15.428571701049805pt;"><b>Introducing Twenty Fifteen</b></span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
 **(unknown attachment: dyn.age81a5xhpvsce)** 
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier-Bold;font-size:12pt;"><b>Our newest default theme, Twenty Fifteen, is a blog-focused theme designed for clarity.</b></span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
 **(unknown attachment: dyn.age81a5xhpvsce)** 
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">Twenty Fifteen has flawless language support, with help from</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22https://www.google.com/get/noto/%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>Google’s Noto font family</u></a><span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">.</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">The straightforward typography is readable on any screen size.</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">Your content always takes center stage, whether viewed on a phone, tablet, laptop, or desktop computer.</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>

<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier-Bold;font-size:15.428571701049805pt;"><b>Distraction-free writing</b></span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
 **(unknown attachment: dyn.age81a5xhpvsce)** 
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier-BoldOblique;font-size:12pt;"><b><i>Just write.</i></b></span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">Sometimes, you just need to concentrate on putting your thoughts into words. Try turning on</span> <span style="font-family:Courier-Bold;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;"><b>distraction-free writing mode</b></span><span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">. When you start typing, all the distractions will fade away, letting you focus solely on your writing. All your editing tools instantly return when you need them.</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>

<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier-Bold;font-size:15.428571701049805pt;"><b>The Finer Points</b></span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
 **(unknown attachment: dyn.age81a5xhpvsce)** 
<span style="font-family:Courier-Bold;font-size:8.571428298950195pt;"><b>Choose a language</b></span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">Right now, WordPress 4.1 is already translated into over forty languages, with more always in progress. You can switch to any translation on the General Settings screen.</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
 **(unknown attachment: dyn.age81a5xhpvsce)** 
<span style="font-family:Courier-Bold;font-size:8.571428298950195pt;"><b>Log out everywhere</b></span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">If you’ve ever worried you forgot to sign out from a shared computer, you can now go to your profile and log out everywhere.</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
 **(unknown attachment: dyn.age81a5xhpvsce)** 
<span style="font-family:Courier-Bold;font-size:8.571428298950195pt;"><b>Vine embeds</b></span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">Embedding videos from Vine is as simple as pasting a URL onto its own line in a post. See the</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22https://codex.wordpress.org/Embeds%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>full list</u></a> <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">of supported embeds.</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
 **(unknown attachment: dyn.age81a5xhpvsce)** 
<span style="font-family:Courier-Bold;font-size:8.571428298950195pt;"><b>Plugin recommendations</b></span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">The plugin installer suggests plugins for you to try. Recommendations are based on the plugins you and other users have installed.</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>

<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier-Bold;font-size:15.428571701049805pt;"><b>Under the Hood</b></span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier-Bold;font-size:8.571428298950195pt;"><b>Complex Queries</b></span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">Metadata, date, and term queries now support advanced conditional logic, like nested clauses and multiple operators — A AND ( B OR C ).</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier-Bold;font-size:8.571428298950195pt;"><b>Customizer API</b></span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">The customizer now supports conditionally showing panels and sections based on the page being previewed.</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier-Bold;font-size:8.571428298950195pt;"><b><title> tags in themes</b></span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">add_theme_support( \'title-tag\' ) tells WordPress to handle the complexities of document titles.</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier-Bold;font-size:8.571428298950195pt;"><b>Developer Reference</b></span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">Continued improvements to inline code documentation have made the</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22https://developer.wordpress.org/reference/%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>developer reference</u></a> <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">more complete than ever.</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>

<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier-Bold;font-size:15.428571701049805pt;"><b>The Choir</b></span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">This release was led by</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22https://profiles.wordpress.org/johnbillion%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>John Blackbourn</u></a><span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">, with the help of these awesome folks. Check out some of their profiles while listening to Dinah Washington on the music service of your choice:</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span><a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22https://profiles.wordpress.org/aaroncampbell%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>Aaron D. Campbell</u></a><span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">,</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22https://profiles.wordpress.org/jorbin%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>Aaron Jorbin</u></a><span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">,</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22https://profiles.wordpress.org/adamsilverstein%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>Adam Silverstein</u></a><span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">,</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22https://profiles.wordpress.org/akumria%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>akumria</u></a><span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">,</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22https://profiles.wordpress.org/xknown%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>Alex Concha</u></a><span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">,</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22https://profiles.wordpress.org/viper007bond%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>Alex Mills (Viper007Bond)</u></a><span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">,</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22https://profiles.wordpress.org/tellyworth%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>Alex Shiels</u></a><span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">,</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22https://profiles.wordpress.org/collinsinternet%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>Allan Collins</u></a><span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">,</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22https://profiles.wordpress.org/momo360modena%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>Amaury Balmer</u></a><span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">,</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22https://profiles.wordpress.org/amruta123b%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>Amruta Bhosale</u></a><span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">,</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22https://profiles.wordpress.org/afercia%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>Andrea Fercia</u></a><span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">,</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22https://profiles.wordpress.org/andg%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>Andrea Gandino</u></a><span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">,</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22https://profiles.wordpress.org/sumobi%5C%22" rel="noopener" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">.\n</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">There were 283 contributors to this release, again a new high.</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">If you want to help out or follow along, check out</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22https://make.wordpress.org/%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>Make WordPress</u></a> <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">and our</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22https://make.wordpress.org/core/%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>core development blog</u></a><span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">.</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">Thanks for choosing WordPress. Happy holidays and see you next year for version 4.2!</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}}s:36:\"http://wellformedweb.org/CommentAPI/\";a:1:{s:10:\"commentRss\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:46:\"https://wordpress.org/news/2014/12/dinah/feed/\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}}s:38:\"http://purl.org/rss/1.0/modules/slash/\";a:1:{s:8:\"comments\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:1:\"0\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}}}}i:2;a:6:{s:4:\"data\";s:45:\"\n		\n		\n		\n		\n		\n				\n		\n\n		\n		\n				\n			\n		\n		\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";s:5:\"child\";a:5:{s:0:\"\";a:7:{s:5:\"title\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:33:\"WordPress 3\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}s:4:\"link\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:69:\"https://wordpress.org/news/2014/12/wordpress-4-1-release-candidate-3/\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}s:8:\"comments\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:78:\"https://wordpress.org/news/2014/12/wordpress-4-1-release-candidate-3/#comments\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}s:7:\"pubDate\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:31:\"Thu, 18 Dec 2014 02:22:15 +0000\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}s:8:\"category\";a:2:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:11:\"Development\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}i:1;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:8:\"Releases\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}s:4:\"guid\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:33:\"http://wordpress.org/news/?p=3411\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:1:{s:0:\"\";a:1:{s:11:\"isPermaLink\";s:5:\"false\";}}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}s:11:\"description\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:429:\"The next release candidate for WordPress 4.1 is now available for testing. Seventy changes have gone in since the first release candidate. With no known issues left, we plan to release 4.1 tomorrow, December 18. To test, try the WordPress Beta Tester plugin (you’ll want “bleeding edge nightlies”). Or you can download the release candidate here (zip). If you’d like to learn more about […]\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}}s:32:\"http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/\";a:1:{s:7:\"creator\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:15:\"John Blackbourn\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}}s:40:\"http://purl.org/rss/1.0/modules/content/\";a:1:{s:7:\"encoded\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:1465:\"</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">The next release candidate for WordPress 4.1 is now available for testing.</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
<a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22https://core.trac.wordpress.org/log/trunk?rev=30961&stop_rev=30827%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#00eeff;"><u>Seventy changes</u></a> <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">have gone in since the</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22https://wordpress.org/news/2014/12/wordpress-4-1-release-candidate/%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>first release candidate</u></a><span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">. With no known issues left, we plan to release 4.1 tomorrow, December 18.</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">To test, try the</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22https://wordpress.org/plugins/wordpress-beta-tester/%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>WordPress Beta Tester</u></a> <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">plugin (you’ll want “bleeding edge nightlies”). Or you can</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22https://wordpress.org/wordpress-4.1-RC3.zip%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>download the release candidate here</u></a> <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">(zip). If you’d like to learn more about what’s new in WordPress 4.1, visit the updated About screen in your dashboard (</span>
 **(unknown attachment: dyn.age81a5xhpvsce)** 
 <span style="font-family:Menlo-Bold;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;"><b>→</b></span> <span style="font-family:Courier-Bold;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;"><b>About</b></span> <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">in the toolbar) and also check out</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22https://wordpress.org/news/2014/11/wordpress-4-1-beta-1/%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>the Beta 1 post</u></a><span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">.</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier-Bold;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;"><b>Plugin authors:</b></span> <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">Remember to test your plugins against 4.1, and if they’re compatible, make sure they are marked as tested up to 4.1. Be sure to follow along the core development blog; we’ve been posting</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22https://make.wordpress.org/core/tag/4-1-dev-notes/%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>notes for developers for 4.1</u></a> <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">as always.</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}}s:36:\"http://wellformedweb.org/CommentAPI/\";a:1:{s:10:\"commentRss\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:74:\"https://wordpress.org/news/2014/12/wordpress-4-1-release-candidate-3/feed/\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}}s:38:\"http://purl.org/rss/1.0/modules/slash/\";a:1:{s:8:\"comments\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:1:\"0\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}}}}i:3;a:6:{s:4:\"data\";s:45:\"\n		\n		\n		\n		\n		\n				\n		\n\n		\n		\n				\n			\n		\n		\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";s:5:\"child\";a:5:{s:0:\"\";a:7:{s:5:\"title\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:31:\"WordPress +0000\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}s:8:\"category\";a:2:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:8:\"Releases\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}i:1;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:3:\"4.1\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}s:4:\"guid\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:33:\"http://wordpress.org/news/?p=3375\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:1:{s:0:\"\";a:1:{s:11:\"isPermaLink\";s:5:\"false\";}}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}s:11:\"description\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:341:\"The release candidate for WordPress 4.1 is now available. We’ve made a lot of refinements over the last few weeks. RC means we think we’re done, but with millions of users and thousands of plugins and themes, it’s possible we’ve missed something. We hope to ship WordPress 4.1 on Tuesday, December 16, but we need your […]\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}}s:32:\"http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/\";a:1:{s:7:\"creator\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:15:\"John Blackbourn\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}}s:40:\"http://purl.org/rss/1.0/modules/content/\";a:1:{s:7:\"encoded\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:2301:\"</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">The release candidate for WordPress 4.1 is now available.</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">We’ve made a lot of refinements over the last few weeks. RC means we think we’re done, but with millions of users and thousands of plugins and themes, it’s possible we’ve missed something. We hope to ship WordPress 4.1 on Tuesday, December 16, but we need your help to get there. If you haven’t tested 4.1 yet, now is the time! (Please though, not on your live site unless you’re adventurous.)</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier-Bold;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;"><b>Think you’ve found a bug?</b></span> <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">Please post to the</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22https://wordpress.org/support/forum/alphabeta/%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>Alpha/Beta support forum</u></a><span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">. If any known issues come up, you’ll be able to</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22https://core.trac.wordpress.org/report/5%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>find them here</u></a><span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">.</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">To test WordPress 4.1 RC1, you can use the</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22https://wordpress.org/plugins/wordpress-beta-tester/%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>WordPress Beta Tester</u></a> <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">plugin or you can</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22https://wordpress.org/wordpress-4.1-RC1.zip%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>download the release candidate here</u></a> <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">(zip). If you’d like to learn more about what’s new in WordPress 4.1, visit the About screen in your dashboard (</span>
 **(unknown attachment: dyn.age81a5xhpvsce)** 
 <span style="font-family:Menlo-Bold;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;"><b>→</b></span> <span style="font-family:Courier-Bold;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;"><b>About</b></span> <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">in the toolbar) or check out the</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22https://wordpress.org/news/2014/11/wordpress-4-1-beta-1/%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>beta announcement</u></a><span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">.</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier-Bold;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;"><b>Developers</b></span><span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">, please test your plugins and themes against WordPress 4.1 and update your plugin’s</span> <span style="font-family:Courier-Oblique;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;"><i>Tested up to</i></span> <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">version in the readme to 4.1 before next week. If you find compatibility problems, we never want to break things, so please be sure to post to the support forums so we can figure those out before the final release.</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">Be sure to</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22https://make.wordpress.org/core/%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>follow along the core development blog</u></a><span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">, where we’ll continue to post</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22https://make.wordpress.org/core/tag/4-1-dev-notes/%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>notes for developers</u></a> <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">for 4.1. (For example: if you’ve written a child theme for Twenty Fifteen, some of the new pagination functions have been renamed for clarity.)</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier-Oblique;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;"><i>Testing four point one</i></span> <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span><span style="font-family:Courier-Oblique;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;"><i>Why are we up at this hour?</i></span> <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span><span style="font-family:Courier-Oblique;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;"><i>Code is poetry</i></span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}}s:36:\"http://wellformedweb.org/CommentAPI/\";a:1:{s:10:\"commentRss\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:72:\"https://wordpress.org/news/2014/12/wordpress-4-1-release-candidate/feed/\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}}s:38:\"http://purl.org/rss/1.0/modules/slash/\";a:1:{s:8:\"comments\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:1:\"0\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}}}}i:4;a:6:{s:4:\"data\";s:45:\"\n		\n		\n		\n		\n		\n				\n		\n\n		\n		\n				\n			\n		\n		\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";s:5:\"child\";a:5:{s:0:\"\";a:7:{s:5:\"title\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:32:\"WordPress 4.0.1 Security Release\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}s:4:\"link\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:51:\"https://wordpress.org/news/2014/11/wordpress-4-0-1/\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}s:8:\"comments\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:60:\"https://wordpress.org/news/2014/11/wordpress-4-0-1/#comments\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}s:7:\"pubDate\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:31:\"Thu, 20 Nov 2014 18:55:18 +0000\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}s:8:\"category\";a:2:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:8:\"Releases\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}i:1;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:8:\"Security\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}s:4:\"guid\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:33:\"http://wordpress.org/news/?p=3363\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:1:{s:0:\"\";a:1:{s:11:\"isPermaLink\";s:5:\"false\";}}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}s:11:\"description\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:345:\"WordPress 4.0.1 is now available. This is a critical security release for all previous versions and we strongly encourage you to update your sites immediately. Sites that support automatic background updates will be updated to WordPress 4.0.1 within the next few hours. If you are still on WordPress 3.9.2, 3.8.4, or 3.7.4, you will be […]\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}}s:32:\"http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/\";a:1:{s:7:\"creator\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:12:\"Andrew Nacin\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}}s:40:\"http://purl.org/rss/1.0/modules/content/\";a:1:{s:7:\"encoded\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:3395:\"</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">WordPress 4.0.1 is now available. This is a</span> <span style="font-family:Courier-Bold;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;"><b>critical security release</b></span> <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">for all previous versions and we strongly encourage you to update your sites immediately.</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">Sites that support automatic background updates will be updated to WordPress 4.0.1 within the next few hours. If you are still on WordPress 3.9.2, 3.8.4, or 3.7.4, you will be updated to 3.9.3, 3.8.5, or 3.7.5 to keep everything secure. (We don’t support older versions, so please update to 4.0.1 for the latest and greatest.)</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">WordPress versions 3.9.2 and earlier are affected by a critical cross-site scripting vulnerability, which could enable anonymous users to compromise a site. This was reported by</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22http://klikki.fi/%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>Jouko Pynnonen</u></a><span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">. This issue does not affect version 4.0, but version 4.0.1 does address these eight security issues:</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
- <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
- <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">Three cross-site scripting issues that a contributor or author could use to compromise a site. Discovered by</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22http://joncave.co.uk/%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>Jon Cave</u></a><span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">,</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22http://www.miqrogroove.com/%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>Robert Chapin</u></a><span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">, and</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22https://johnblackbourn.com/%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>John Blackbourn</u></a> <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">of the WordPress security team.</span>
- <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
- <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">A cross-site request forgery that could be used to trick a user into changing their password.</span>
- <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
- <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">An issue that could lead to a denial of service when passwords are checked. Reported by</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22http://www.behindthefirewalls.com/%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>Javier Nieto Arevalo</u></a> <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">and</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22http://www.devconsole.info/%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>Andres Rojas Guerrero</u></a><span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">.</span>
- <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
- <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">Additional protections for server-side request forgery attacks when WordPress makes HTTP requests. Reported by Ben Bidner (vortfu).</span>
- <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
- <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">An extremely unlikely hash collision could allow a user’s account to be compromised, that also required that they haven’t logged in since 2008 (I wish I were kidding). Reported by</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22http://david.dw-perspective.org.uk%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>David Anderson</u></a><span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">.</span>
- <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
- <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">WordPress now invalidates the links in a password reset email if the user remembers their password, logs in, and changes their email address. Reported separately by</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22https://twitter.com/MomenBassel%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>Momen Bassel</u></a><span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">,</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22http://c0dehouse.blogspot.in/%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>Tanoy Bose</u></a><span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">, and</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22https://managewp.com/%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>Bojan Slavković of ManageWP</u></a><span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">.</span>
- <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">Version 4.0.1 also fixes 23 bugs with 4.0, and we’ve made two hardening changes, including better validation of EXIF data we are extracting from uploaded photos. Reported by</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22http://www.securesolutions.no/%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>Chris Andrè Dale</u></a><span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">.</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">We appreciated the</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22https://codex.wordpress.org/FAQ_Security%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>responsible disclosure</u></a> <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">of these issues directly to our security team. For more information, see the</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22https://codex.wordpress.org/Version_4.0.1%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>release notes</u></a> <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">or consult the</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22https://core.trac.wordpress.org/log/branches/4.0?rev=30475&stop_rev=29710%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>list of changes</u></a><span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">.</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
<a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22https://wordpress.org/download/%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#00eeff;"><u>Download WordPress 4.0.1</u></a> <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">or venture over to</span> <span style="font-family:Courier-Bold;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;"><b>Dashboard</b></span> <span style="font-family:Menlo-Bold;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;"><b>→</b></span> <span style="font-family:Courier-Bold;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;"><b>Updates</b></span> <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">and simply click “Update Now”.</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier-Oblique;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;"><i>Already testing WordPress 4.1? The second beta is now available (</i></span><a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22https://wordpress.org/wordpress-4.1-beta2.zip%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier-Oblique;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><i><u>zip</u></i></a><span style="font-family:Courier-Oblique;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;"><i>) and it contains these security fixes. For more on 4.1, see</i></span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22https://wordpress.org/news/2014/11/wordpress-4-1-beta-1/%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier-Oblique;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><i><u>the beta 1 announcement post</u></i></a><span style="font-family:Courier-Oblique;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;"><i>.</i></span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}}s:36:\"http://wellformedweb.org/CommentAPI/\";a:1:{s:10:\"commentRss\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:56:\"https://wordpress.org/news/2014/11/wordpress-4-0-1/feed/\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}}s:38:\"http://purl.org/rss/1.0/modules/slash/\";a:1:{s:8:\"comments\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:1:\"0\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}}}}i:5;a:6:{s:4:\"data\";s:48:\"\n		\n		\n		\n		\n		\n				\n		\n		\n\n		\n		\n				\n			\n		\n		\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";s:5:\"child\";a:5:{s:0:\"\";a:7:{s:5:\"title\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:20:\"WordPress 4.1 Beta 1\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}s:4:\"link\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:56:\"https://wordpress.org/news/2014/11/wordpress-4-1-beta-1/\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}s:8:\"comments\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:65:\"https://wordpress.org/news/2014/11/wordpress-4-1-beta-1/#comments\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}s:7:\"pubDate\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:31:\"Fri,
