+0000\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}s:8:\"category\";a:3:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:11:\"Development\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}i:1;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:8:\"Releases\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}i:2;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:4:\"beta\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}s:4:\"guid\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:33:\"http://wordpress.org/news/?p=3352\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:1:{s:0:\"\";a:1:{s:11:\"isPermaLink\";s:5:\"false\";}}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}s:11:\"description\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:346:\"Welcome, everyone, to WordPress 4.1 Beta 1! This software is still in development, so we don’t recommend you run it on a production site. Consider setting up a test site just to play with the new version. To test WordPress 4.1, try the WordPress Beta Tester plugin (you’ll want “bleeding edge nightlies”). Or you can […]\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}}s:32:\"http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/\";a:1:{s:7:\"creator\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:15:\"John Blackbourn\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}}s:40:\"http://purl.org/rss/1.0/modules/content/\";a:1:{s:7:\"encoded\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:3409:\"</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">Welcome, everyone, to WordPress 4.1 Beta 1!</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier-Bold;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;"><b>This software is still in development,</b></span> <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">so we don’t recommend you run it on a production site. Consider setting up a test site just to play with the new version. To test WordPress 4.1, try the</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22https://wordpress.org/plugins/wordpress-beta-tester/%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>WordPress Beta Tester</u></a> <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">plugin (you’ll want “bleeding edge nightlies”). Or you can</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22//wordpress.org/wordpress-4.1-beta1.zip%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>download the beta here</u></a> <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">(zip).</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">WordPress 4.1 is due for release next month, so we need your help with testing. Here are some highlights of what to test:</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
- <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
- <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">Our beautiful new default theme,</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22https://make.wordpress.org/core/2014/09/09/twenty-fifteen/%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>Twenty Fifteen</u></a><span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">. It’s a clean, mobile-first, blog-focused theme designed through simplicity.</span>
- <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
- <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">A new</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22https://make.wordpress.org/core/2014/11/11/focus-v2-demo-video/%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>distraction-free writing mode for the editor</u></a><span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">. It’s enabled by default for beta, and we’d love feedback on it.</span>
- <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
- <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">The ability to automatically install new language packs right from the General Settings screen (available as long as your site’s filesystem is writable).</span>
- <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
- <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">A new inline formatting toolbar for images embedded into posts.</span>
- <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">There have been a lot of changes for developers to test as well:</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
- <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
- <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22https://make.wordpress.org/core/2014/10/20/update-on-query-improvements-in-4-1/%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>Improvements to meta, date, comment, and taxonomy queries</u></a><span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">, including complex (nested, multiple relation) queries; and querying comment types (</span><a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22https://core.trac.wordpress.org/ticket/12668%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>#12668</u></a><span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">).</span>
- <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
- <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">A single term shared across multiple taxonomies is now split into two when updated. For more,</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22https://make.wordpress.org/core/2014/11/12/an-update-on-the-taxonomy-roadmap/%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>see this post</u></a><span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">,</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22https://core.trac.wordpress.org/ticket/5809%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>#5809</u></a><span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">, and</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22https://core.trac.wordpress.org/ticket/30335%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>#30335</u></a><span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">.</span>
- <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
- <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">A new and better way for</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22https://make.wordpress.org/core/2014/10/29/title-tags-in-4-1/%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>themes to handle title tags</u></a><span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">.</span>
- <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
- <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">Several</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22https://make.wordpress.org/core/2014/10/27/toward-a-complete-javascript-api-for-the-customizer/%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>improvements to the Customizer API</u></a><span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">, including contextual panels and sections, and JavaScript templates for controls.</span>
- <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">If you want a more in-depth view of what changes have made it into 4.1,</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22https://make.wordpress.org/core/tag/week-in-core/%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>check out the weekly review posts</u></a> <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">on the main development blog.</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier-Bold;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;"><b>If you think you’ve found a bug</b></span><span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">, you can post to the</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22https://wordpress.org/support/forum/alphabeta%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>Alpha/Beta area</u></a> <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">in the support forums. We’d love to hear from you! If you’re comfortable writing a reproducible bug report,</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22https://make.wordpress.org/core/reports/%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>file one on the WordPress Trac</u></a><span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">. There, you can also find</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22https://core.trac.wordpress.org/tickets/major%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>a list of known bugs</u></a> <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">and</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22https://core.trac.wordpress.org/query?status=closed&group=component&milestone=4.1%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>everything we’ve fixed</u></a> <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">so far.</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">Happy testing!</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier-Oblique;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;"><i>Twenty Fifteen theme</i></span> <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span> <span style="font-family:Courier-Oblique;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;"><i>The beautiful face which hides</i></span> <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span> <span style="font-family:Courier-Oblique;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;"><i>Many improvements</i></span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}}s:36:\"http://wellformedweb.org/CommentAPI/\";a:1:{s:10:\"commentRss\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:61:\"https://wordpress.org/news/2014/11/wordpress-4-1-beta-1/feed/\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}}s:38:\"http://purl.org/rss/1.0/modules/slash/\";a:1:{s:8:\"comments\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:1:\"0\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}}}}i:6;a:6:{s:4:\"data\";s:45:\"\n		\n		\n		\n		\n		\n				\n		\n\n		\n		\n				\n			\n		\n		\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";s:5:\"child\";a:5:{s:0:\"\";a:7:{s:5:\"title\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:39:\"Watch WordCamp San Francisco Livestream\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}s:4:\"link\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:51:\"https://wordpress.org/news/2014/10/wcsf-livestream/\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}s:8:\"comments\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:60:\"https://wordpress.org/news/2014/10/wcsf-livestream/#comments\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}s:7:\"pubDate\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:31:\"Fri, 24 Oct 2014 20:18:43 +0000\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}s:8:\"category\";a:2:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:9:\"Community\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}i:1;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:8:\"WordCamp\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}s:4:\"guid\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:33:\"http://wordpress.org/news/?p=3341\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:1:{s:0:\"\";a:1:{s:11:\"isPermaLink\";s:5:\"false\";}}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}s:11:\"description\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:381:\"WordCamp San Francisco is the official annual WordPress conference, gathering the community every year since 2006. This is the time when Matt Mullenweg addresses the community in his annual State of the Word presentation – a recap of  the year in WordPress and giving us a glimpse into its future. This year the speaker lineup is stellar. There will be talks by […]\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}}s:32:\"http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/\";a:1:{s:7:\"creator\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:17:\"Nikolay Bachiyski\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}}s:40:\"http://purl.org/rss/1.0/modules/content/\";a:1:{s:7:\"encoded\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:1975:\"</span>
<a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22http://2014.sf.wordcamp.org%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#00eeff;"><u>WordCamp San Francisco</u></a> <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">is the official annual WordPress conference, gathering the community every year</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22http://2006.sf.wordcamp.org%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>since 2006</u></a><span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">. This is the time when Matt Mullenweg addresses the community in his annual</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22http://wordpress.tv/?s=state+of+the+word%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>State of the Word</u></a> <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">presentation – a recap of  the year in WordPress and giving us a glimpse into its future.</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">This year the speaker lineup is stellar. There will be talks by three of the lead WordPress developers:</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22http://2014.sf.wordcamp.org/speakers/#wcorg-speaker-andrew-nacin%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>Andrew Nacin</u></a><span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">,</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22http://2014.sf.wordcamp.org/speakers/#wcorg-speaker-helen-hou-sandi%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>Helen Hou-Sandí</u></a><span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">, and</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22http://2014.sf.wordcamp.org/speakers/#wcorg-speaker-mark-jaquith%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>Mark Jaquith</u></a><span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">. We’re also looking forward to speakers like</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22http://2014.sf.wordcamp.org/speakers/#wcorg-speaker-jenny-lawson%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>Jenny Lawson</u></a><span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">, also known as The Bloggess, and</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22http://2014.sf.wordcamp.org/speaker/chris-lema/%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>Chris Lema</u></a><span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">. If you’re at all interested in the web, you will appreciate the appearance of</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22http://2014.sf.wordcamp.org/speakers/#wcorg-speaker-jeff-veen%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>Jeff Veen</u></a> <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">– one of the creators of Google Analytics and co-founder of Typekit.</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">Even though San Francisco is far far away for most of you, you can still be part of the fun and watch all presentations in real-time via livestream:</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
<a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22http://2014.sf.wordcamp.org/tickets/%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#00eeff;"><u>Get a livestream ticket and watch all talks from WordCamp San Francisco live</u></a>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">If you hurry, you can get one of the special livestream tickets, including a WordCamp San Francisco 2104 t-shirt. You can find all the technical details and start times</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22http://2014.sf.wordcamp.org/live-stream/%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>at the WordCamp San Francisco website</u></a><span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">.</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}}s:36:\"http://wellformedweb.org/CommentAPI/\";a:1:{s:10:\"commentRss\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:56:\"https://wordpress.org/news/2014/10/wcsf-livestream/feed/\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}}s:38:\"http://purl.org/rss/1.0/modules/slash/\";a:1:{s:8:\"comments\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:1:\"0\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}}}}i:7;a:6:{s:4:\"data\";s:42:\"\n		\n		\n		\n		\n		\n				\n\n		\n		\n				\n			\n		\n		\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";s:5:\"child\";a:5:{s:0:\"\";a:7:{s:5:\"title\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:25:\"WordPress 4.0 “Benny”\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}s:4:\"link\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:41:\"https://wordpress.org/news/2014/09/benny/\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}s:8:\"comments\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:50:\"https://wordpress.org/news/2014/09/benny/#comments\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}s:7:\"pubDate\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:31:\"Thu, 04 Sep 2014 17:05:39 +0000\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}s:8:\"category\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:8:\"Releases\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}s:4:\"guid\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:33:\"http://wordpress.org/news/?p=3296\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:1:{s:0:\"\";a:1:{s:11:\"isPermaLink\";s:5:\"false\";}}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}s:11:\"description\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:370:\"Version 4.0 of WordPress, named “Benny” in honor of jazz clarinetist and bandleader Benny Goodman, is available for download or update in your WordPress dashboard. While 4.0 is just another number for us after 3.9 and before 4.1, we feel we’ve put a little extra polish into it. This release brings you a smoother writing and management experience […]\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}}s:32:\"http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/\";a:1:{s:7:\"creator\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:14:\"Matt Mullenweg\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}}s:40:\"http://purl.org/rss/1.0/modules/content/\";a:1:{s:7:\"encoded\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:23575:\"</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">Version 4.0 of WordPress, named “Benny” in honor of jazz clarinetist and bandleader</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Benny_Goodman%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>Benny Goodman</u></a><span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">, is available</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22https://wordpress.org/download/%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>for download</u></a> <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">or update in your WordPress dashboard. While 4.0 is just another number for us after 3.9 and before 4.1, we feel we’ve put a little extra polish into it. This release brings you a smoother writing and management experience we think you’ll enjoy.</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>

<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>

<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier-Bold;font-size:15.428571701049805pt;"><b>Manage your media with style</b></span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
 **(unknown attachment: dyn.age80y6dhpvsce)** 
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">Explore your uploads in a beautiful, endless grid. A new details preview makes viewing and editing any amount of media in sequence a snap.</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>

<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier-Bold;font-size:15.428571701049805pt;"><b>Working with embeds has never been easier</b></span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span><a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22//s.w.org/images/core/4.0/embed.mp4%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-size:11.142857551574707pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>//s.w.org/images/core/4.0/embed.mp4</u></a>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">Paste in a YouTube URL on a new line, and watch it magically become an embedded video. Now try it with a tweet. Oh yeah — embedding has become a visual experience. The editor shows a true preview of your embedded content, saving you time and giving you confidence.</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">We’ve expanded the services supported by default, too — you can embed videos from CollegeHumor, playlists from YouTube, and talks from TED.</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22https://codex.wordpress.org/Embeds%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>Check out all of the embeds</u></a> <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">that WordPress supports.</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>

<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier-Bold;font-size:15.428571701049805pt;"><b>Focus on your content</b></span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
<a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22//s.w.org/images/core/4.0/focus.mp4%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-size:11.142857551574707pt;color:#00eeff;"><u>//s.w.org/images/core/4.0/focus.mp4</u></a>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">Writing and editing is smoother and more immersive with an editor that expands to fit your content as you write, and keeps the formatting tools available at all times.</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>

<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier-Bold;font-size:15.428571701049805pt;"><b>Finding the right plugin</b></span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
 **(unknown attachment: dyn.age81a5xhpvsce)** 
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">There are more than 30,000 free and open source plugins in the WordPress plugin directory. WordPress 4.0 makes it easier to find the right one for your needs, with new metrics, improved search, and a more visual browsing experience.</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>

<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier-Bold;font-size:15.428571701049805pt;"><b>The Ensemble</b></span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">This release was led by</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22http://helenhousandi.com%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>Helen Hou-Sandí</u></a><span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">, with the help of these fine individuals. There are 275 contributors with props in this release, a new high. Pull up some Benny Goodman on your music service of choice, as a bandleader or in one of his turns as a classical clarinetist, and check out some of their profiles:</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
<a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22https://profiles.wordpress.org/aaroncampbell%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#00eeff;"><u>Aaron D. style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">,</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22https://profiles.wordpress.org/treyhunner%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>treyhunner</u></a><span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">,</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22https://profiles.wordpress.org/umeshsingla%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>Umesh Kumar</u></a><span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">,</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22https://profiles.wordpress.org/vinod-dalvi%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>Vinod Dalvi</u></a><span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">,</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22https://profiles.wordpress.org/vlajos%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>vlajos</u></a><span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">,</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22https://profiles.wordpress.org/voldemortensen%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>voldemortensen</u></a><span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">,</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22https://profiles.wordpress.org/westonruter%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>Weston Ruter</u></a><span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">,</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22https://profiles.wordpress.org/winterdev%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>winterDev</u></a><span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">,</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22https://profiles.wordpress.org/wojtekszkutnik%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>Wojtek Szkutnik</u></a><span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">,</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22https://profiles.wordpress.org/yoavf%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>Yoav Farhi</u></a><span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">,</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22https://profiles.wordpress.org/katzwebdesign%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>Zack Katz</u></a><span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">,</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22https://profiles.wordpress.org/tollmanz%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>Zack Tollman</u></a><span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">, and</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22https://profiles.wordpress.org/zoerooney%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>Zoe Rooney</u></a><span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">. Also thanks to</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22http://michaelpick.wordpress.com/%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>Michael Pick</u></a> <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">for producing the release video, and Helen with</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22http://adriansandi.com%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>Adrián Sandí</u></a> <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">for the music.</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">If you want to follow along or help out, check out</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22https://make.wordpress.org/%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>Make WordPress</u></a> <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">and our</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22https://make.wordpress.org/core/%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>core development blog</u></a><span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">. Thanks for choosing WordPress. See you soon for version 4.1!</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}}s:36:\"http://wellformedweb.org/CommentAPI/\";a:1:{s:10:\"commentRss\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:46:\"https://wordpress.org/news/2014/09/benny/feed/\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}}s:38:\"http://purl.org/rss/1.0/modules/slash/\";a:1:{s:8:\"comments\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:1:\"0\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}}}}i:8;a:6:{s:4:\"data\";s:45:\"\n		\n		\n		\n		\n		\n				\n		\n\n		\n		\n				\n			\n		\n		\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";s:5:\"child\";a:5:{s:0:\"\";a:7:{s:5:\"title\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:31:\"WordPress +0000\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}s:8:\"category\";a:2:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:11:\"Development\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}i:1;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:8:\"Releases\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}s:4:\"guid\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:33:\"http://wordpress.org/news/?p=3287\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:1:{s:0:\"\";a:1:{s:11:\"isPermaLink\";s:5:\"false\";}}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}s:11:\"description\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:321:\"The first release candidate for WordPress 4.0 is now available! In RC 1, we’ve made refinements to what we’ve been working on for this release. Check out the Beta 1 announcement post for more details on those features. We hope to ship WordPress 4.0 next week, but we need your help to get there. If you […]\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}}s:32:\"http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/\";a:1:{s:7:\"creator\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:15:\"Helen Hou-Sandi\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}}s:40:\"http://purl.org/rss/1.0/modules/content/\";a:1:{s:7:\"encoded\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:2134:\"</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">The first release candidate for WordPress 4.0 is now available!</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">In RC 1, we’ve made refinements to what we’ve been working on for this release. Check out the</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22https://wordpress.org/news/2014/07/wordpress-4-0-beta-1/%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>Beta 1 announcement post</u></a> <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">for more details on those features. We hope to ship WordPress 4.0</span> <span style="font-family:Courier-Oblique;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;"><i>next week</i></span><span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">, but we need your help to get there. If you haven’t tested 4.0 yet, there’s no time like the present. (Please, not on a production site, unless you’re adventurous.)</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier-Bold;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;"><b>Think you’ve found a bug?</b></span> <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">Please post to the</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22https://wordpress.org/support/forum/alphabeta/%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>Alpha/Beta area in the support forums</u></a><span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">. If any known issues come up, you’ll be able to</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22https://core.trac.wordpress.org/report/5%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>find them here</u></a><span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">.</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">To test WordPress 4.0 RC1, try the</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22https://wordpress.org/extend/plugins/wordpress-beta-tester/%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>WordPress Beta Tester</u></a> <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">plugin (you’ll want “bleeding edge nightlies”). Or you can</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22https://wordpress.org/wordpress-4.0-RC1.zip%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>download the release candidate here</u></a> <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">(zip). If you’d like to learn more about what’s new in WordPress 4.0, visit the awesome About screen in your dashboard (</span>
 **(unknown attachment: public.png)** 
 <span style="font-family:Menlo-Bold;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;"><b>→</b></span> <span style="font-family:Courier-Bold;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;"><b>About</b></span> <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">in the toolbar).</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier-Bold;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;"><b>Developers,</b></span> <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">please test your plugins and themes against WordPress 4.0 and update your plugin’s</span> <span style="font-family:Courier-Oblique;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;"><i>Tested up to</i></span> <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">version in the readme to 4.0 before next week. If you find compatibility problems, please be sure to post any issues to the support forums so we can figure those out before the final release. You also may want to</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22https://make.wordpress.org/core/2014/08/21/introducing-plugin-icons-in-the-plugin-installer/%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>give your plugin an icon</u></a><span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">, which we launched last week and will appear in the dashboard along with banners.</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier-Oblique;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;"><i>It is almost time</i></span> <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span> <span style="font-family:Courier-Oblique;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;"><i>For the 4.0 release</i></span> <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span> <span style="font-family:Courier-Oblique;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;"><i>And its awesomeness</i></span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}}s:36:\"http://wellformedweb.org/CommentAPI/\";a:1:{s:10:\"commentRss\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:72:\"https://wordpress.org/news/2014/08/wordpress-4-0-release-candidate/feed/\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}}s:38:\"http://purl.org/rss/1.0/modules/slash/\";a:1:{s:8:\"comments\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:1:\"0\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}}}}i:9;a:6:{s:4:\"data\";s:45:\"\n		\n		\n		\n		\n		\n				\n		\n\n		\n		\n				\n			\n		\n		\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";s:5:\"child\";a:5:{s:0:\"\";a:7:{s:5:\"title\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:20:\"WordPress 4.0 Beta 4\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}s:4:\"link\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:56:\"https://wordpress.org/news/2014/08/wordpress-4-0-beta-4/\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}s:8:\"comments\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:65:\"https://wordpress.org/news/2014/08/wordpress-4-0-beta-4/#comments\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}s:7:\"pubDate\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:31:\"Fri, 15 Aug 2014 05:06:19 +0000\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}s:8:\"category\";a:2:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:11:\"Development\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}i:1;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:8:\"Releases\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}s:4:\"guid\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:33:\"http://wordpress.org/news/?p=3280\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:1:{s:0:\"\";a:1:{s:11:\"isPermaLink\";s:5:\"false\";}}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}s:11:\"description\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:353:\"The fourth and likely final beta for WordPress 4.0 is now available. We’ve made more than 250 changes in the past month, including: Further improvements to the editor scrolling experience, especially when it comes to the second column of boxes. Better handling of small screens in the media library modals. A separate bulk selection mode […]\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}}s:32:\"http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/\";a:1:{s:7:\"creator\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:15:\"Helen Hou-Sandi\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}}s:40:\"http://purl.org/rss/1.0/modules/content/\";a:1:{s:7:\"encoded\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:2003:\"</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">The fourth and likely final beta for WordPress 4.0 is now available. We’ve made</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22https://core.trac.wordpress.org/log?rev=29496&stop_rev=29229&limit=300%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>more than 250 changes</u></a> <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">in the past month, including:</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
- <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
- <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">Further improvements to the editor scrolling experience, especially when it comes to the second column of boxes.</span>
- <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
- <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">Better handling of small screens in the media library modals.</span>
- <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
- <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">A separate bulk selection mode for the media library grid view.</span>
- <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
- <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">Improvements to the installation language selector.</span>
- <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
- <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">Visual tweaks to plugin details and customizer panels.</span>
- <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier-Bold;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;"><b>We need your help</b></span><span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">. We’re still aiming for a release this month, which means the next week will be critical for identifying and squashing bugs. If you’re just joining us, please see</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22https://wordpress.org/news/2014/07/wordpress-4-0-beta-1/%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>the Beta 1 announcement post</u></a> <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">for what to look out for.</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier-Bold;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;"><b>If you think you’ve found a bug</b></span><span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">, you can post to the</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22https://wordpress.org/support/forum/alphabeta%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>Alpha/Beta area</u></a> <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">in the support forums, where friendly moderators are standing by.</span> <span style="font-family:Courier-Bold;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;"><b>Plugin developers,</b></span> <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">if you haven’t tested WordPress 4.0 yet, now is the time — and be sure to update the “tested up to” version for your plugins so they’re listed as compatible with 4.0.</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier-Bold;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;"><b>This software is still in development,</b></span> <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">so we don’t recommend you run it on a production site. Consider setting up a test site just to play with the new version. To test WordPress 4.0, try the</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22https://wordpress.org/extend/plugins/wordpress-beta-tester/%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>WordPress Beta Tester</u></a> <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">plugin (you’ll want “bleeding edge nightlies”). Or you can</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22https://wordpress.org/wordpress-4.0-beta4.zip%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>download the beta here</u></a> <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">(zip).</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier-Oblique;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;"><i>We are working hard</i></span> <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span><span style="font-family:Courier-Oblique;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;"><i>To finish up 4.0 \nWill you help us too?</i></span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}}s:36:\"http://wellformedweb.org/CommentAPI/\";a:1:{s:10:\"commentRss\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:61:\"https://wordpress.org/news/2014/08/wordpress-4-0-beta-4/feed/\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}}s:38:\"http://purl.org/rss/1.0/modules/slash/\";a:1:{s:8:\"comments\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:1:\"0\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}}}}}}s:27:\"http://www.w3.org/2005/Atom\";a:1:{s:4:\"link\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:0:\"\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:1:{s:0:\"\";a:3:{s:4:\"href\";s:32:\"https://wordpress.org/news/feed/\";s:3:\"rel\";s:4:\"self\";s:4:\"type\";s:19:\"application/rss+xml\";}}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}}s:44:\"http://purl.org/rss/1.0/modules/syndication/\";a:2:{s:12:\"updatePeriod\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:6:\"hourly\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}s:15:\"updateFrequency\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:1:\"1\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}}}}}}}}}}}s:4:\"type\";i:128;s:7:\"headers\";a:9:{s:6:\"server\";s:5:\"nginx\";s:4:\"date\";s:29:\"Tue, 10 Mar 2015 23:42:06 GMT\";s:12:\"content-type\";s:23:\"text/xml; charset=UTF-8\";s:10:\"connection\";s:5:\"close\";s:4:\"vary\";s:15:\"Accept-Encoding\";s:10:\"x-pingback\";s:37:\"https://wordpress.org/news/xmlrpc.php\";s:13:\"last-modified\";s:29:\"Wed, 18 Feb 2015 23:40:39 GMT\";s:15:\"x-frame-options\";s:10:\"SAMEORIGIN\";s:4:\"x-nc\";s:11:\"HIT lax 250\";}s:5:\"build\";s:14:\"20130911040210\";}',	'no'),</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">(870,	'_transient_timeout_feed_d117b5738fbd35bd8c0391cda1f2b5d9',	'1426074130',	'no'),</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">(871,	'_transient_feed_d117b5738fbd35bd8c0391cda1f2b5d9',	'a:4:{s:5:\"child\";a:1:{s:0:\"\";a:1:{s:3:\"rss\";a:1:{i:0;a:6:{s:4:\"data\";s:3:\"\n\n\n\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:1:{s:0:\"\";a:1:{s:7:\"version\";s:3:\"2.0\";}}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";s:5:\"child\";a:1:{s:0:\"\";a:1:{s:7:\"channel\";a:1:{i:0;a:6:{s:4:\"data\";s:61:\"\n	\n	\n	\n	\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";s:5:\"child\";a:1:{s:0:\"\";a:5:{s:5:\"title\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:16:\"WordPress Planet\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}s:4:\"link\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:28:\"http://planet.wordpress.org/\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}s:8:\"language\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:2:\"en\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}s:11:\"description\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:47:\"WordPress Planet - http://planet.wordpress.org/\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}s:4:\"item\";a:50:{i:0;a:6:{s:4:\"data\";s:13:\"\n	\n	\n	\n	\n	\n	\n\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";s:5:\"child\";a:2:{s:0:\"\";a:5:{s:5:\"title\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:78:\"WPTavern: Delicious Brains Publishes In-depth Guides on The WordPress Database\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}s:4:\"guid\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:28:\"http://wptavern.com/?p=40388\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}s:4:\"link\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:88:\"http://wptavern.com/delicious-brains-publishes-in-depth-guides-on-the-wordpress-database\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}s:11:\"description\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:1896:\"</span>
<a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22https://deliciousbrains.com/%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#00eeff;"><u>Delicious Brains</u></a><span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">, the creators of</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22https://wordpress.org/plugins/wp-migrate-db/%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>WP Migrate DB</u></a><span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">,</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22https://deliciousbrains.com/tour-wordpress-database/%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>published a guide</u></a> <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">that walks developers through the WordPress database. The guide describes every database table and there associated columns within WordPress single site. It also features an</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22http://codex.wordpress.org/Database_Description#Database_Diagram%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>entity relationship diagram</u></a> <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">that explains the relationships between the various tables. Although the image was created for WordPress 3.8, it’s still accurate.</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">For those who want to learn the database structure of WordPress Multisite, check out their</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22https://deliciousbrains.com/wordpress-multisite-database-tour/%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>Multisite database tour</u></a> <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">as there are some key database changes to take note of:</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">When a WordPress site is</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22http://codex.wordpress.org/Create_A_Network%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>converted to a Multisite install</u></a><span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">, a “network” of subsites is created. The existing site is converted to the first subsite in the network. The database classes the network itself as a site (wp_site), and each subsite as a blog (wp_blogs).</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">Certain tables are used only by a subsite, and a new set of tables are created every time a site is added to the network. Each set of tables is differentiated by the blog_id for the subsite used in the table prefix. e.g. `wp_2_posts`.</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">I encourage you to bookmark both guides as they’re excellent resources.</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}s:7:\"pubDate\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:31:\"Tue, 10 Mar 2015 21:58:38 +0000\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}}s:32:\"http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/\";a:1:{s:7:\"creator\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:13:\"Jeff Chandler\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}}}}i:1;a:6:{s:4:\"data\";s:13:\"\n	\n	\n	\n	\n	\n	\n\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";s:5:\"child\";a:2:{s:0:\"\";a:5:{s:5:\"title\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:116:\"WPTavern: CodeGuard Survey Shows More Education is Needed on Backup Software, Services, and Strategies For WordPress\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}s:4:\"guid\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:28:\"http://wptavern.com/?p=40341\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}s:4:\"link\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:124:\"http://wptavern.com/codeguard-survey-shows-more-education-is-needed-on-backup-software-services-and-strategies-for-wordpress\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}s:11:\"description\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:4426:\"</span>
 **(unknown attachment: public.png)** 
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
<a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22https://www.codeguard.com/%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#00eeff;"><u>CodeGuard</u></a><span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">, a service that specializes in automated backups to the cloud, has published the results of its 2015 WordPress survey. The survey took place between February 18th-20th and was answered by 503 WordPress users. Backing up is an important part of maintaining a website, so it’s a bit shocking to see such high percentages of people who either don’t backup on a regular basis or who don’t think backup plans are important.</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">Out of 503 respondents:</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
- <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
- <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">25% have received “very little training” in the use of WordPress</span>
- <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
- <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">22% haven’t been trained at all in WordPress backup and have “no idea” how to do it</span>
- <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
- <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">21% have seen the “white screen of death” multiple times, and “it’s horrible!”</span>
- <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
- <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">69% have had a plugin fail after an update, and 24% have had it happen “many times”</span>
- <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
- <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">63% have deleted files that were not backed up</span>
- <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
- <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">22% said that a backup plugin seems “unimportant” to them</span>
- <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
- <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">24% said “This site is my livelihood, I’d pay almost anything for a complete restore,” while 19% said they’d be willing to spend several thousand dollars, at least</span>
- <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">I’m surprised to see only 24% of respondents use a backup plugin at all considering there’s so many</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22https://wordpress.org/plugins/search.php?q=backup%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>free options available</u></a><span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">. There appears to be a correlation between those who have little to no WordPress training and the lack of education on how to establish a backup plan. I realize 503 WordPress users is not a large sample size, but the numbers indicate more education is needed on backup software, services, and strategies.</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">It’s also alarming to see 69% of respondents have had a plugin fail after an update and 24% of those have had it happen several times. This is further proof that WordPress is</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22http://wptavern.com/its-time-for-wordpress-to-automatically-update-themes-plugins-and-core-by-default%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>not ready to automatically update plugins</u></a> <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">by default.</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">An important data point missing from the survey is how many of the respondents rely on automatic backups provided by their webhost. Not every user needs a plugin to manage backups and for a number of managed WordPress hosting companies, automatic backups are part of the package. In fact, most managed WordPress hosting providers discourage and disallow backup plugins from being used. An</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22http://wpengine.com/support/disallowed-plugins/%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>example is WP Engine</u></a><span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">:</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">In general, however, we discourage the use of backup plugins. They needlessly duplicate our built-in functionality, rely on a large amount of local storage and can store files in an insecure manner. Not only that, many of these plugins run their backup jobs at inopportune times. This can slow database connectivity with extra — and sometimes very large — MySQL queries and cause timeouts on larger sites.</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">This infographic provided by CodeGuard visually shows the survey’s results. When browsing, I suggest replacing</span> <span style="font-family:Courier-Oblique;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;"><i>WordPress users</i></span> <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">with</span> <span style="font-family:Courier-Oblique;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;"><i>respondents</i></span> <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">as WordPress users sounds too broad. After reviewing the data, let me know if the results surprise you or if it corresponds to what you’re experiencing with clients.</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
 **(unknown attachment: public.png)** 
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">CodeGuard Infographic Showing Survey Results\n</span>
 
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}s:7:\"pubDate\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:31:\"Tue, 10 Mar 2015 19:49:12 +0000\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}}s:32:\"http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/\";a:1:{s:7:\"creator\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:13:\"Jeff Chandler\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}}}}i:2;a:6:{s:4:\"data\";s:13:\"\n	\n	\n	\n	\n	\n	\n\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";s:5:\"child\";a:2:{s:0:\"\";a:5:{s:5:\"title\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:87:\"WPTavern: WordPress Antispam Bee Plugin Adds Option to Trust Commenters with a Gravatar\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}s:4:\"guid\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:28:\"http://wptavern.com/?p=40344\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}s:4:\"link\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:97:\"http://wptavern.com/wordpress-antispam-bee-plugin-adds-option-to-trust-commenters-with-a-gravatar\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}s:11:\"description\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:4082:\"</span>
 **(unknown attachment: public.jpeg)** 
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">photo credit:</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22http://www.flickr.com/photos/54563451@N08/9302552275%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>Osmia pumila, M, Face, MD_2013-06-25.18.39.16 ZS PMax</u></a> <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">–</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/2.0/%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>(license)</u></a><span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">Version 2.6.5 of the popular</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22https://wordpress.org/plugins/antispam-bee/%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>Antispam Bee</u></a> <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">plugin is out today with a new feature that allows administrators to trust commenters with a</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22https://en.gravatar.com/%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>Gravatar</u></a><span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">. The idea for the function was suggested by Caspar Hübinger, a long-time user of the plugin.</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">“Have you ever seen a spam comment with a Gravatar image?  I haven’t,” Hübinger said in a</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22http://glueckpress.com/6500/trust-the-gravatar/%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>post</u></a> <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">introducing the new feature. “So I suggested to include an option in Antispam Bee to trust commenters with a Gravatar by default, and Sergej, creator of Antispam Bee, was kind enough to implement it.”</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">Although the plugin was mentioned by Matt Mullenweg during his Q&A at WordCamp Europe 2014, English speakers have largely overlooked it in the past. Antispam Bee was created by German WordPress plugin developer</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22http://wpcoder.de/%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>Sergej Müller</u></a> <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">and its description page on WordPress.org is written in German. He has actively developed and maintained the plugin since 2009. It is currently used on 200,000+ installations of WordPress.</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">One might think that it would make sense to include an English copy of the description to gain a larger user base, but Müller elected to keep it in German due to the plugin’s incompatibilities. Antispam Bee is incompatible with many of the major commenting systems used by English speakers, including Disqus, Jetpack Comments, and AJAX Comment Form.</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">English speakers who use</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22http://jetpack.me/support/comments/%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>Jetpack Comments</u></a> <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">often use</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22http://akismet.com/%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>Akismet</u></a><span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">, since the two work together seamlessly. Akismet is far more well-known, since it comes packaged with WordPress by default. However, Antispam Bee has a solid set of features that make it a decent alternative:</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
- <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
- <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">Ad-free</span>
- <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
- <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">No storage of personal data</span>
- <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
- <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">No registration required</span>
- <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
- <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">Free for commercial projects</span>
- <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
- <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">No adjustment required by theme templates</span>
- <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
- <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">All functions can be controlled by the user</span>
- <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
- <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">Statistics for the last 30 days displayed as a dashboard widget</span>
- <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
- <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">Supports six languages: German, English, French, Russian, Dutch, and Slovenian</span>
- <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">The plugin also comes with 20 configurable options for customizing its spam-blocking features, including the ability to disable spam email notifications, block comments from certain countries, allow comments only in certain languages, delete after X days, and much more. These options allow you to tailor your anti-spam shield to lessen your moderation load.</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
 **(unknown attachment: public.jpeg)** 
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">If you’re intrigued by</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22https://wordpress.org/plugins/antispam-bee/%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>Antispam Bee</u></a><span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">‘s latest feature that allows you to trust commenters who have a Gravatar, give the plugin a try the next time you’re reviewing spam-blocking solutions. The option is a creative use of WordPress’ built-in support for Gravatar. Current users of the plugin can find the new setting in the admin under</span> <span style="font-family:Courier-Bold;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;"><b>Settings > Antispam Bee</b></span><span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">.</span>
