<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}s:7:\"pubDate\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:31:\"Mon, 02 Mar 2015 16:32:05 +0000\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}}s:32:\"http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/\";a:1:{s:7:\"creator\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:12:\"Joseph Scott\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}}}}i:37;a:6:{s:4:\"data\";s:13:\"\n	\n	\n	\n	\n	\n	\n\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";s:5:\"child\";a:2:{s:0:\"\";a:5:{s:5:\"title\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:19:\"Matt: Pink and Blue\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}s:4:\"guid\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:21:\"http://ma.tt/?p=44743\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}s:4:\"link\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:35:\"http://ma.tt/2015/03/pink-and-blue/\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}s:11:\"description\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:753:\"</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">A June 1918 article from the trade publication Earnshaw’s Infants’ Department said, “The generally accepted rule is pink for the boys, and blue for the girls. The reason is that pink, being a more decided and stronger color, is more suitable for the boy, while blue, which is more delicate and dainty, is prettier for the girl.” Other sources said blue was flattering for blonds, pink for brunettes; or blue was for blue-eyed babies, pink for brown-eyed babies, according to Paoletti.</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">Did you know</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22http://www.smithsonianmag.com/arts-culture/when-did-girls-start-wearing-pink-1370097/?all%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>pink and blue implying gender is relatively new, and all babies used to just wear white dresses</u></a><span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">?</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}s:7:\"pubDate\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:31:\"Mon, 02 Mar 2015 16:06:33 +0000\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}}s:32:\"http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/\";a:1:{s:7:\"creator\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:4:\"Matt\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}}}}i:38;a:6:{s:4:\"data\";s:13:\"\n	\n	\n	\n	\n	\n	\n\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";s:5:\"child\";a:2:{s:0:\"\";a:5:{s:5:\"title\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:23:\"Matt: Text as Interface\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}s:4:\"guid\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:21:\"http://ma.tt/?p=44737\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}s:4:\"link\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:39:\"http://ma.tt/2015/03/text-as-interface/\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}s:11:\"description\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:212:\"</span>
<a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22http://whoo.ps/2015/02/23/futures-of-text%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#00eeff;"><u>Great piece by Jonathan Libov on text-based messaging interfaces for everything in the future</u></a><span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">, it’s like the command line has come alive again.</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}s:7:\"pubDate\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:31:\"Sun, 01 Mar 2015 17:11:03 +0000\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}}s:32:\"http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/\";a:1:{s:7:\"creator\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:4:\"Matt\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}}}}i:39;a:6:{s:4:\"data\";s:13:\"\n	\n	\n	\n	\n	\n	\n\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";s:5:\"child\";a:2:{s:0:\"\";a:5:{s:5:\"title\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:25:\"Matt: Watching Television\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}s:4:\"guid\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:21:\"http://ma.tt/?p=44735\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}s:4:\"link\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:41:\"http://ma.tt/2015/02/watching-television/\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}s:11:\"description\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:1403:\"</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">It wasn’t that long ago, in the grand scheme of things, that I didn’t have any TV shows I was actively watching. Life has been busier than ever, but I’ve started catching up with shows instead of movies when flying. I’ve been blown away by the high quality of storytelling  in the medium of television right now.</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">So I find myself actively watching a few different shows:</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
1. <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
2. <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">House of Cards (new season out today!).</span>
3. <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
4. <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">True Detective.</span>
5. <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
6. <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">Scandal.</span>
7. <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
8. <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">Blacklist.</span>
9. <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
10. <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">Empire.</span>
11. <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
12. <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">West Wing.</span>
13. <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">There are some guilty pleasures in there, and there are probably a dozen shows that friends have recommended to me as amazing that I’ve never even started. (Hence West Wing, I’m watching it for the first time, somewhere in Season 4.)</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">This is the first time I’m watching things that are still “on” versus something like Firefly or Sopranos which are complete already. There’s definitely something fun about discussing the latest developments with other people who are also caught up, in the zeitgeist, and the anticipation of new episodes coming out, like what I imagine it must have been like with</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Serial_%28literature%29%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>serialized novels back in the day</u></a><span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">.</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}s:7:\"pubDate\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:31:\"Sun, 01 Mar 2015 03:43:42 +0000\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}}s:32:\"http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/\";a:1:{s:7:\"creator\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:4:\"Matt\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}}}}i:40;a:6:{s:4:\"data\";s:13:\"\n	\n	\n	\n	\n	\n	\n\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";s:5:\"child\";a:2:{s:0:\"\";a:5:{s:5:\"title\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:51:\"Matt: Writing code is like solving a Rubik’s cube\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}s:4:\"guid\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:21:\"http://ma.tt/?p=44731\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}s:4:\"link\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:31:\"http://ma.tt/2015/02/code-cube/\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}s:11:\"description\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:171:\"</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">Ben Dwyer on why</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22https://scruffian.wordpress.com/2013/10/18/writing-code-is-like-solving-a-rubiks-cube/%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>writing code is like solving a Rubik’s cube</u></a><span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">.</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}s:7:\"pubDate\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:31:\"Sat, 28 Feb 2015 04:55:19 +0000\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}}s:32:\"http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/\";a:1:{s:7:\"creator\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:4:\"Matt\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}}}}i:41;a:6:{s:4:\"data\";s:13:\"\n	\n	\n	\n	\n	\n	\n\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";s:5:\"child\";a:2:{s:0:\"\";a:5:{s:5:\"title\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:47:\"Post Status: The most popular WordPress plugins\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}s:4:\"guid\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:30:\"https://poststatus.com/?p=8913\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}s:4:\"link\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:49:\"https://poststatus.com/popular-wordpress-plugins/\";s:7:\"attribs\";a:0:{}s:8:\"xml_base\";s:0:\"\";s:17:\"xml_base_explicit\";b:0;s:8:\"xml_lang\";s:0:\"\";}}s:11:\"description\";a:1:{i:0;a:5:{s:4:\"data\";s:15391:\"</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">WordPress has long had download counts for core WordPress, plugins, and themes.</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">But downloads counts are deceiving. They count downloads, but are not representative of actual active installs.</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">Recently — in</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22https://poststatus.com/notes/time-ditch-download-counts-wordpress-org-get-real-stats/%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>my Club member newsletter</u></a> <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">— I noted that it is past time to get data for actual installs, versus download counts. There is a private beta program on WordPress.org that offers just that, and at least some of the new stats are launching</span> <span style="font-family:Courier-Oblique;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;"><i>very, very</i></span> <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">soon (</span><span style="font-family:Courier-BoldOblique;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;"><b><i>edit</i></b></span><span style="font-family:Courier-Oblique;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;"><i>: the initial changes are now live</i></span><span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">).</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">The new plugin stats pages will show four new charts, visible to plugin authors:</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
- <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
- <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">New installs per day</span>
- <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
- <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">Updates per day</span>
- <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
- <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">Active installs per day</span>
- <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
- <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">Active versions</span>
- <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">Most importantly, the “active installs per day” chart shows us — with much greater precision than we previously had — how many actual websites are running any plugin available on WordPress.org.</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">For the beta period, utilizing a non-public query string parameter, I was able to see these stats publicly for any plugin on the repo. That query string parameter has now changed, so the data is no longer publicly visible.</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">These stats are partially launching very shortly, to highlight the active installs for plugins as well as the breakdown of active versions. Active install counts will replace the download count in the right column.</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">You can see an example of what the new</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22https://wordpress.org/plugins/wordpress-importer/stats/%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>public stats from the WordPress Importer plugin</u></a> <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">look like, which will be visible to users. Plugin authors will see a slightly different view that contains the additional stats:</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
 **(unknown attachment: dyn.age81a5xhpvsce)** 
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">Click to view full size</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
 
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier-Bold;font-size:12pt;"><b>The most popular WordPress plugins</b></span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">I took some time to look through the most popular WordPress plugins I could think of, as well as other notable plugins. What follows are some of the numbers I recorded, which were noted in the charts as being recorded February 24th.</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">Once this data goes live, the counts will be revised to round with less detail, and for installs over 1 million, will simply say “1 Million+”.</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n</span>

| <p style="text-align:center;margin:0"><span style="font-family:Courier-Bold;font-size:12pt;"><b>Plugin</b></span></p> | <p style="text-align:center;margin:0"><span style="font-family:Courier-Bold;font-size:12pt;"><b>Downloads</b></span></p> | <p style="text-align:center;margin:0"><span style="font-family:Courier-Bold;font-size:12pt;"><b>Active Installs</b></span></p> |
| -- | -- | -- |
| <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22https://wordpress.org/plugins/contact-form-7/%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:12pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>Contact Form 7</u></a> | <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:12pt;">24.304 million</span> | <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:12pt;">6.3+ million</span> |
| <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22https://wordpress.org/plugins/akismet/%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:12pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>Akismet</u></a> | <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:12pt;">28.128 million</span> | <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:12pt;">6.2+ million</span> |

| <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22https://wordpress.org/plugins/nextgen-gallery/%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:12pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>NextGen Gallery</u></a> | <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:12pt;">11.991 million</span> | <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:12pt;">1.3+ million</span> |

| <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22https://wordpress.org/plugins/woocommerce/%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:12pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>WooCommerce</u></a> | <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:12pt;">6.445 million</span> | <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:12pt;">1.2+ million</span> |
| <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22https://wordpress.org/plugins/hello-dolly/%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:12pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>Hello Dolly</u></a> | <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:12pt;">510,136</span> | <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:12pt;">1.1+ million</span> |
| <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22https://wordpress.org/plugins/wp-pagenavi/%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:12pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>WP Page Navi</u></a> | <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:12pt;">5.432 million</span> | <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:12pt;">1.1+ million</span> |
| <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22https://wordpress.org/plugins/w3-total-cache/%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:12pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>W3 Total Cache</u></a> | <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:12pt;">4.491 million</span> | <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:12pt;">970,000+</span> |
| <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22https://wordpress.org/plugins/wordfence/%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:12pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>WordFence</u></a> | <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:12pt;">4.828 million</span> | <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:12pt;">710,000+</span> |
| <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22https://wordpress.org/plugins/better-wp-security/%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:12pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>Better WP Security</u></a> | <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:12pt;">4.259 million</span> | <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:12pt;">600,000+</span> |
| <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22https://wordpress.org/plugins/wptouch/%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:12pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>WPTouch</u></a> | <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:12pt;">6.743 million</span> | <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:12pt;">410,000+</span> |
| <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22https://wordpress.org/plugins/bbpress/%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:12pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>bbPress</u></a> | <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:12pt;">1.741 million</span> | <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:12pt;">250,000+</span> |
| <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22https://wordpress.org/plugins/wysija-newsletters/%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:12pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>MailPoet</u></a> | <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:12pt;">3.447 million</span> | <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:12pt;">230,000+</span> |
| <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22https://wordpress.org/plugins/the-events-calendar/%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:12pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>The Events Calendar</u></a> | <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:12pt;">1.438 million</span> | <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:12pt;">230,000+</span> |
| <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22https://wordpress.org/plugins/buddypress/%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:12pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>BuddyPress</u></a> | <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:12pt;">2.647 million</span> | <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:12pt;">150,000+</span> |
| <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22https://wordpress.org/plugins/wp-e-commerce/%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:12pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>WP eCommerce</u></a> | <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:12pt;">3.009 million</span> | <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:12pt;">80,000+</span> |


<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">As you can see, the data is incredibly insightful, especially compared to the public download stats. However, beware that</span> <span style="font-family:Courier-Oblique;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;"><i>there is not a guarantee of accuracy here</i></span><span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">, and in fact you should know that in some instances, the team knows the data isn’t reporting properly, especially for plugins with more installs.</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">Contact Form 7 and Akismet are by far the most popular WordPress plugins, with over six million active installs each. I included most of the plugins from the</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22https://wordpress.org/plugins/browse/popular/%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>Popular page on the repo</u></a><span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">, plus some additional notable plugins.</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">There are also a number of outliers, where the discrepancy between downloads and active installs is huge. I believe this is largely due to plugins with long histories that were once immensely popular but have since faded in popularity.</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">The download count keeps old plugins relevant far longer than if active installs were the prominent number.</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier-Bold;font-size:12pt;"><b>Compared to BuiltWith data</b></span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">How accurate is this data? Well, one smell-test we can give it is to compare it to other potentially inaccurate data. From my research, BuiltWith is doing one of the best jobs around of accurately checking site data. Go ahead and input your domain to BuiltWith and see how accurate it is for you.</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">So, if we compare this same plugin list to BuiltWith data for “the entire Internet” — as they segment based on site rankings — then we can get a feel for how well the WordPress.org number and theBuiltWith number get along.</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">In this table, I link to the BuiltWith page so you can get more information if you like. Do note that some plugins aren’t available on BuiltWith, so are in the list but don’t have information.</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n</span>

| <p style="text-align:center;margin:0"><span style="font-family:Courier-Bold;font-size:12pt;"><b>Plugin</b></span></p> | <p style="text-align:center;margin:0"><span style="font-family:Courier-Bold;font-size:12pt;"><b>BuiltWith</b></span></p> | <p style="text-align:center;margin:0"><span style="font-family:Courier-Bold;font-size:12pt;"><b>Active Installs</b></span></p> |
| -- | -- | -- |
| <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22http://trends.builtwith.com/widgets/Contact-Form-7%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:12pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>Contact Form 7</u></a> | <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:12pt;">594,677</span> | <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:12pt;">6.3+ million</span> |
