<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">DROP TABLE IF EXISTS `wp_podsrel`;</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">CREATE TABLE `wp_podsrel` (</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">`id` bigint(20) unsigned NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">`pod_id` int(10) unsigned DEFAULT NULL,</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">`field_id` int(10) unsigned DEFAULT NULL,</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">`item_id` bigint(20) unsigned DEFAULT NULL,</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">`related_pod_id` int(10) unsigned DEFAULT NULL,</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">`related_field_id` int(10) unsigned DEFAULT NULL,</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">`related_item_id` bigint(20) unsigned DEFAULT NULL,</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">`weight` smallint(5) unsigned DEFAULT '0',</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">PRIMARY KEY (`id`),</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">KEY `field_item_idx` (`field_id`,`item_id`),</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">KEY `rel_field_rel_item_idx` (`related_field_id`,`related_item_id`),</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">KEY `field_rel_item_idx` (`field_id`,`related_item_id`),</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">KEY `rel_field_item_idx` (`related_field_id`,`item_id`)</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">) ENGINE=MyISAM DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8;</span>


<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">DROP TABLE IF EXISTS `wp_postmeta`;</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">CREATE TABLE `wp_postmeta` (</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">`meta_id` bigint(20) unsigned NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">`post_id` bigint(20) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">`meta_key` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">`meta_value` longtext,</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">PRIMARY KEY (`meta_id`),</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">KEY `post_id` (`post_id`),</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">KEY `meta_key` (`meta_key`)</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">) ENGINE=MyISAM DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8;</span>

<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">DROP TABLE IF EXISTS `wp_posts`;</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">CREATE TABLE `wp_posts` (</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">`ID` bigint(20) unsigned NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">`post_author` bigint(20) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">`post_date` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT '0000-00-00 00:00:00',</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">`post_date_gmt` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT '0000-00-00 00:00:00',</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">`post_content` longtext NOT NULL,</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">`post_title` text NOT NULL,</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">`post_excerpt` text NOT NULL,</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">`post_status` varchar(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'publish',</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">`comment_status` varchar(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'open',</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">`ping_status` varchar(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'open',</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">`post_password` varchar(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">`post_name` varchar(200) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">`to_ping` text NOT NULL,</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">`pinged` text NOT NULL,</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">`post_modified` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT '0000-00-00 00:00:00',</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">`post_modified_gmt` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT '0000-00-00 00:00:00',</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">`post_content_filtered` longtext NOT NULL,</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">`post_parent` bigint(20) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">`guid` varchar(255) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">`menu_order` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">`post_type` varchar(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'post',</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">`post_mime_type` varchar(100) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">`comment_count` bigint(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">PRIMARY KEY (`ID`),</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">KEY `post_name` (`post_name`),</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">KEY `type_status_date` (`post_type`,`post_status`,`post_date`,`ID`),</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">KEY `post_parent` (`post_parent`),</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">KEY `post_author` (`post_author`)</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">) ENGINE=MyISAM DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8;</span>

<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">INSERT INTO `wp_posts` (`ID`, `post_author`, `post_date`, `post_date_gmt`, `post_content`, `post_title`, `post_excerpt`, `post_status`, `comment_status`, `ping_status`, `post_password`, `post_name`, `to_ping`, `pinged`, `post_modified`, `post_modified_gmt`, `post_content_filtered`, `post_parent`, `guid`, `menu_order`, `post_type`, `post_mime_type`, `comment_count`) VALUES</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">(1,	1,	'2015-02-19 08:36:33',	'2015-02-19 08:36:33',	'Welcome to WordPress. This is your first post. Edit or delete it, then start blogging!',	'Hello world!',	'',	'trash',	'open',	'open',	'',	'hello-world',	'',	'',	'2015-02-27 23:38:12',	'2015-02-27 23:38:12',	'',	0,	'http://project.teamsparrow.net/pharexperts/?p=1',	0,	'post',	'',	1),</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">(2,	1,	'2015-02-19 08:36:33',	'2015-02-19 08:36:33',	'This is an example page. It\'s different from a blog post because it will stay in one place and will show up in your site navigation (in most themes). Most people start with an About page that introduces them to potential site visitors. It might say something like this:\r\n</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">Hi there! I\'m a bike messenger by day, aspiring actor by night, and this is my blog. I live in Los Angeles, have a great dog named Jack, and I like piña coladas. (And gettin\' caught in the rain.)</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\r\n...or something like this:\r\n</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">The XYZ Doohickey Company was founded in 1971, and has been providing quality doohickeys to the public ever since. Located in Gotham City, XYZ employs over 2,000 people and does all kinds of awesome things for the Gotham community.</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\r\nAs a new WordPress user, you should go to</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22http://project.teamsparrow.net/pharexperts/wp-admin/%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>your dashboard</u></a> <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">to delete this page and create new pages for your content. Have fun!',	'Infographics - Hypertension',	'',	'publish',	'open',	'closed',	'',	'infographics-hypertension-2',	'',	'',	'2015-03-07 04:01:01',	'2015-03-07 04:01:01',	'',	0,	'http://project.teamsparrow.net/pharexperts/?page_id=2',	0,	'page',	'',	0),</span>

<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">(127,	1,	'2015-03-02 21:18:00',	'2015-03-02 21:18:00',	'May 2, 2014, members of the Philippine Urological Association held their Midyear convention Fellowship Night at the Plaza del Norte Hotel and Convention Center Laoag, Ilocos Norte. The event was co-sponsored by Pharex Health Corporation.\r\n\r\nPUA came up with the theme “Manong URO meets Manang Biday” for this year’s fellowship night. The event was started with the Opening Message from PUA untiring President Dr. Ulysses Quanico, followed by the performances of different training institutions of PUA who participated in Chorale group singing contest.\r\n\r\nFurther added the fun for the evening was the raffle prizes courtesy of Mr. Aron J.Panganiban, Product Manager of Pharex Levofloxacin and the all out performances of doctors who joined the videoke singing challenge.\r\n\r\nBefore the evening ends, the judges have chosen the winner for PUA chorale singing contest where the AFP Medical Center bagged the grand prize of P20, 000 courtesy of Pharex Levofloxacin awarded by PUA President Dr. Ulysses Quanico together with Pharex National Sales Manager Mr. Allan Estrada. Non winning institution did not go home empty handed, for all the contestants got their consolation prize.\r\n\r\nThe fun filled event was hosted by Dr. Diosdado Limjoco and Dr. Gavino Mercado who generously shared their humour for the love of PUA members.\r\n\r\n</span>
 **(unknown attachment: dyn.age80y6dhpvsce)** 
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\r\nDr. Ulysses Quanico with PUA chorale singing contest grand winner presented the award with Pharex NSM Mr. Allan Estrada and Dr. Diosdado Limjoco\r\n\r\n</span>
 **(unknown attachment: dyn.age80y6dhpvsce)**

The event was co-sponsored by Pharex Health Corporation.\r\n\r\nPUA came up with the theme “Manong URO meets Manang Biday” for this year’s fellowship night. The event was started with the Opening Message from PUA untiring President Dr. Ulysses Quanico, followed by the performances of different training institutions of PUA who participated in Chorale group singing contest.\r\n\r\nFurther added the fun for the evening was the raffle prizes courtesy of Mr. Aron J.Panganiban, Product Manager of Pharex Levofloxacin and the all out performances of doctors who joined the videoke singing challenge.\r\n\r\nBefore the evening ends, the judges have chosen the winner for PUA chorale singing contest where the AFP Medical Center bagged the grand prize of P20, 000 courtesy of Pharex Levofloxacin awarded by PUA President Dr. Ulysses Quanico together with Pharex National Sales Manager Mr. Allan Estrada. Non winning institution did not go home empty handed, for all the contestants got their consolation prize.\r\n\r\nThe fun filled event was hosted by Dr. Diosdado Limjoco and Dr. Gavino Mercado who generously shared their humour for the love of PUA members.\r\n\r\n</span>

<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">(166,	1,	'2015-03-07 03:59:51',	'2015-03-07 03:59:51',	'This is an example page. It\'s different from a blog post because it will stay in one place and will show up in your site navigation (in most themes). Most people start with an About page that introduces them to potential site visitors. It might say something like this:\n\n</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">Hi there! I\'m a bike messenger by day, aspiring actor by night, and this is my blog. I live in Los Angeles, have a great dog named Jack, and I like piña coladas. (And gettin\' caught in the rain.)</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n\n...or something like this:\n\n</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">The XYZ Doohickey Company was founded in 1971, and has been providing quality doohickeys to the public ever since. Located in Gotham City, XYZ employs over 2,000 people and does all kinds of awesome things for the Gotham community.</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\n\nAs a new WordPress user, you should go to</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22http://project.teamsparrow.net/pharexperts/wp-admin/%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>your dashboard</u></a> <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">to delete this page and create new pages for your content. Have fun!',	'Sample Page',	'',	'inherit',	'open',	'open',	'',	'2-revision-v1',	'',	'',	'2015-03-07 03:59:51',	'2015-03-07 03:59:51',	'',	2,	'http://project.teamsparrow.net/pharexperts/2-revision-v1/',	0,	'revision',	'',	0),</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">(167,	1,	'2015-03-07 04:01:01',	'2015-03-07 04:01:01',	'This is an example page. Most people start with an About page that introduces them to potential site visitors. It might say something like this:\r\n</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">Hi there! I\'m a bike messenger by day, aspiring actor by night, and this is my blog. I live in Los Angeles, have a great dog named Jack, and I like piña coladas. (And gettin\' caught in the rain.)</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\r\n...or something like this:\r\n</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">The XYZ Doohickey Company was founded in 1971, and has been providing quality doohickeys to the public ever since. Located in Gotham City, XYZ employs over 2,000 people and does all kinds of awesome things for the Gotham community.</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">\r\nAs a new WordPress user, you should go to</span> <a href="applewebdata://53B4E767-2D66-426A-B2AA-63A3781179F0/%22http://project.teamsparrow.net/pharexperts/wp-admin/%5C%22" rel="noopener" class="external-link" target="_blank" style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;color:#e4afaff;"><u>your dashboard</u></a> <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">to delete this page and create new pages for your content. <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">DROP TABLE IF EXISTS `wp_terms`;</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">CREATE TABLE `wp_terms` (</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">`term_id` bigint(20) unsigned NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">`name` varchar(200) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">`slug` varchar(200) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">`term_group` bigint(10) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">`term_order` int(4) DEFAULT '0',</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">PRIMARY KEY (`term_id`),</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">KEY `slug` (`slug`),</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">KEY `name` (`name`)</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">) ENGINE=MyISAM DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8;</span>

<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">DROP TABLE IF EXISTS `wp_term_relationships`;</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">CREATE TABLE `wp_term_relationships` (</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">`object_id` bigint(20) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',</span>

  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">`term_order` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">PRIMARY KEY (`object_id`,`term_taxonomy_id`),</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">KEY `term_taxonomy_id` (`term_taxonomy_id`)</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">) ENGINE=MyISAM DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8;</span>

<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">DROP TABLE IF EXISTS `wp_term_taxonomy`;</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">CREATE TABLE `wp_term_taxonomy` (</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">`term_taxonomy_id` bigint(20) unsigned NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">`term_id` bigint(20) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">`taxonomy` varchar(32) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">`description` longtext NOT NULL,</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">`parent` bigint(20) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">`count` bigint(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">PRIMARY KEY (`term_taxonomy_id`),</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">UNIQUE KEY `term_id_taxonomy` (`term_id`,`taxonomy`),</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">KEY `taxonomy` (`taxonomy`)</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">) ENGINE=MyISAM DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8;</span>

<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">DROP TABLE IF EXISTS `wp_usermeta`;</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">CREATE TABLE `wp_usermeta` (</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">`umeta_id` bigint(20) unsigned NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">`user_id` bigint(20) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">`meta_key` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">`meta_value` longtext,</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">PRIMARY KEY (`umeta_id`),</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">KEY `user_id` (`user_id`),</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">KEY `meta_key` (`meta_key`)</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">) ENGINE=MyISAM DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8;</span>

<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">DROP TABLE IF EXISTS `wp_users`;</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">CREATE TABLE `wp_users` (</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">`ID` bigint(20) unsigned NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">`user_login` varchar(60) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">`user_pass` varchar(64) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">`user_nicename` varchar(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">`user_email` varchar(100) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">`user_url` varchar(100) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">`user_registered` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT '0000-00-00 00:00:00',</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">`user_activation_key` varchar(60) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">`user_status` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">`display_name` varchar(250) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">PRIMARY KEY (`ID`),</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">KEY `user_login_key` (`user_login`),</span>
  <span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">KEY `user_nicename` (`user_nicename`)</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">) ENGINE=MyISAM DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8;</span>

<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">INSERT INTO `wp_users` (`ID`, `user_login`, `user_pass`, `user_nicename`, `user_email`, `user_url`, `user_registered`, `user_activation_key`, `user_status`, `display_name`) VALUES</span>
<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">(1,	'admin',	'$P$BOwQ.n295hiulzADBqFTaKLhjm45Nz1',	'admin',	'arnold.gamboa@gmail.com',	'',	'2015-02-19 08:36:33',	'',	0,	'admin');</span>

<span style="font-family:Courier;font-size:10.285714149475098pt;">-- 2015-03-23 06:19:41</span>
